brief: Postmortem traces a high-severity customer-facing regression back to an unreviewed assumption in a release path and delayed detection in monitoring. Main corrective actions are tighter stage gates, better rollback clarity, and a smaller blast radius for future deploys.
whyItMatters: One incident becomes part of a searchable learning atlas.
searchIntro: One incident becomes part of a searchable learning atlas. Search across the reference records to feel that inside the app.

brief: A second reference record extends the same workflow so in-app search and reuse are visible instead of theoretical.

brief: A third reference record shows how this app can connect follow-up work, recurring themes, and downstream use without leaving the demo experience.
